---
title: "Data Normalization"
author: "Helen Moses"
date: "2026-03-24"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
# load necessary packages
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
# load un-normalized data 
movie <- read_csv("movie.csv")
colnames(movie)
```

```{r}
# movies table
movies <- movie[,c("id", "title", "original_title", "imdb_id", "release_date",
                   "runtime", "budget", "revenue", "overview", "tagline", 
                   "homepage", "poster_path", "backdrop_path")]

#save table as csv
write_csv(movies, "movies.csv")
```
